---
title: "Research projects & grants"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

## Overview

- **Principal Investigator** — Determinants of Mental Health among Military Personnel
- **Principal Investigator** — A Study on Improving the 36-hour Consecutive Duty System for Residents
- Peer reviewer for *International Journal of Equity in Health* and *BMC Public Health*

## Principal Investigator

- **Determinants of Mental Health among Military Personnel**
  - Commissioned Research Grant, Armed Forces Medical Command (MND)
  - **2026.03–2027.03** (KRW 6,380,000)
- **A Study on Improving the 36-hour Consecutive Shift System for Medical Interns and Residents**
  - Commissioned Research Grant, Korean Medical Association Institute for Healthcare Policy
  - **2023.05–2024.01** (KRW 10,000,000)
- **Korean Intern and Resident Survey**
  - Korean Intern and Resident Association
  - **2022.09–2023.02**

## Co-Investigator

- **Changes in Medical Utilization at Military Hospitals Following the 2024 Healthcare Crisis**
  - Armed Forces Medical Command (MND) — **2026**
- **Analysis of Healthcare Utilization of Military Personnel in Military and Civilian Hospitals**
  - Armed Forces Medical Command (MND) — **2025–2026**
- **Strengthening Response and Management Capacity for Infectious Diseases in the Military**
  - Korea Disease Control and Prevention Agency (KDCA) — **2025**
- **Development of a Roadmap for Health Hazard Prevention and Management**
  - Korea Disease Control and Prevention Agency (KDCA) — **2025**
- **Malaria Screening Support and Climate-Based Predictive Modeling among Deployed ROK Forces**
  - Armed Forces Medical Research Institute (MND) — **2025**
- **Exposure to Febrile Infectious Diseases among ROK Forces Deployed in South Sudan**
  - Armed Forces Medical Command (MND) — **2025**
- **A Comprehensive Review for Military Vaccination Policy Decision**
  - Armed Forces Medical Command (MND) — **2024**

## Research Assistant

- **The Impact of COVID-19 on Health Equity**
  - Ministry of Health and Welfare — **2022.06–2022.12**
  - (Literature review, NHIS big-data analysis, report writing)
- **Analysis of the Use of Community Services by People with Mental Illness Living in Rental Housing**
  - Presidential Committee on Policy Planning — **2022.02–2022.04**
- **Research on the Formation of Community-based Customized Mental Health Living Labs**
  - Korea University — **2021.11–2022.01**
- **Improving the Quality of Psychiatric Institutions**
  - Ministry of Health and Welfare — **2021.04–2021.12**
  - (Research administration, on-site surveys of psychiatric institutions, data analysis)
- **A Study on the Improvement of the National Surveillance System on Sexually Transmitted Infections**
  - Korea Disease Control and Prevention Agency (KDCA) — **2021.09–2022.03**
- **Seroprevalence Survey and Development of Preventive Guidelines for Q Fever among High-Risk Groups**
  - Korea Disease Control and Prevention Agency (KDCA) — **2021.11–2022.03**
  - (Research administration, field seroepidemiologic survey)
- **Spatio-temporal Analysis of Disease and Health-related Factors**
  - Korea University Medicine — **2021.09–2022.02**
- **Education and Reinforcement Project of Prevention, Diagnosis and Analysis of Infectious Diseases (KOICA–Tashkent Medical University)**
  - Korea International Cooperation Agency (KOICA) — **2021.11–2021.12**
  - (Health Specialist: R-based epidemiology training, survey data processing and analysis)
- **Policy Studies on the Private Certification System for Medical Devices in South Korea**
  - **2021.04–2021.12**
- **Effect of Socioeconomic Factors on Health in the Old-aged Group: Complex Chronic Diseases**
  - Korea University Medicine — **2016.10–2017.01**

## Public Engagement Projects

- **Space Sharing Project for the Youth** — Woosadan Studio — **2018–2020**
- **Street Concert Series: Humanities and Arts** — Ministry of Culture, Sports and Tourism — **2018**
- **Usadan Studio Opening Party** — Woosadan Studio — **2018**
- **Student Housing Action: Dormitory Project** — Korea University — **2015**
- **Korea University Festival** — Korea University — **2015**
